context.projectOverview: Bober Vision: transforming agent-bober into a multi-mode software engineering teammate. Four modes: autopilot, careful-flow, diagnose, postmortem. Tier 3 (sprints 15-25) introduces the prod-incident agent shape: read-only diagnoser, observability MCP slots, change-management gates, rollback, postmortem.

completedSprints.title: Iron Law / Red Flags / Rationalization-Prevention voice + bober.debug skill
completedSprints.summary: Behavioral discipline patterns ported from obra/superpowers.

completedSprints.title: Voice pass across agent prompts
completedSprints.summary: 5 agent prompts gained role-specific Iron Law + Red Flags + Rationalization-Prevention tables. Voice style now uniform.

completedSprints.title: Anti-pattern reference catalog
completedSprints.summary: 4 MIT-attributed reference docs at .bober/anti-patterns/ + evaluator Step 6.5 citations.

completedSprints.title: bober-code-reviewer agent
completedSprints.summary: Code-review subagent + skill + advisory-only orchestrator wiring.

completedSprints.title: HARD-GATE + AGENTS.md
completedSprints.summary: Planner HARD-GATE checkpoint + repo-root AGENTS.md contract.

completedSprints.title: Careful-flow plumbing
completedSprints.summary: src/orchestrator/checkpoints/ module wired into pipeline.ts at 9 sites with noop default.

completedSprints.title: CLI checkpoint mechanism
completedSprints.summary: Blocking CLI prompts with stderr + readline + $EDITOR + non-TTY noop fallback.

completedSprints.title: Disk-marker mechanism + approve CLI
completedSprints.summary: File-based approval queue; bober approve/reject/list-approvals CLI commands.

completedSprints.title: GitHub PR-native mechanism
completedSprints.summary: Run-tracking PR with checkbox state; GhClient seam; disk fallback. getCheckpointMechanismFor resolver.

completedSprints.title: Feedback propagation to agents
completedSprints.summary: feedback-router: reject→reinvoke up to maxIterations then abort marker; edit→applyEditDelta with backup; !!abort token.

completedSprints.title: Approval audit trail
completedSprints.summary: Append-only JSONL audit at .bober/audits/<runId>.jsonl with race-safe writes; bober audit show CLI.

completedSprints.title: Mode + mechanism config
completedSprints.summary: pipeline.mode (autopilot|careful), pipeline.checkpointMechanism, checkpointOverrides, approvalTimeoutMs, prPollMs. CLI --mode/--checkpoint/--checkpoint-all flags. Mode-derived default mechanism resolver.
